title: SupaWave now has an explicit J2CL root-shell route that can host the current workflow
summary: Added a non-default `/?view=j2cl-root` root-shell page that preserves auth and route state, mounts the current J2CL search/read/write workflow, and leaves the legacy GWT root as the default shell.

items: Added a signed-in and signed-out J2CL root-shell seam behind `/?view=j2cl-root` without changing the default `/` bootstrap
The J2CL root shell now preserves its explicit selector plus `q` and `wave` state across route updates and auth round-trips
The hosted J2CL workflow now renders shell-aware copy inside the root shell while `/j2cl-search/index.html` remains available as the sidecar verification route
